name: Blackwell B200 Architecture Optimization
trigger: B200, Blackwell, sm_100, compute_100, GB200, tcgen05
approach: Target Blackwell B200: 148 SMs, 228KB SMEM per SM, 8 TB/s HBM3e, 4500 TFLOPS FP8, 2250 TFLOPS BF16. Key Blackwell features: (1) Tensor Memory (TMEM) — 128x512 on-chip memory for MMA accumulators, replacing register-based accumulation from Hopper. Results must be transferred TMEM→registers via tcgen05.ld before custom arithmetic. (2) TMA (cp.async.bulk.tensor) for async HBM→SMEM loads. (3) tcgen05.mma instruction launched by single thread (not warpgroup like Hopper wgmma). (4) 2-CTA clustering for collaborative matrix multiply (15-20% speedup). (5) MXFP8 block-scaled MMA via tcgen05.mma...block_scale — handles dequantization in hardware, avoiding CUDA core dequant bottleneck. (6) Warp specialization: assign different warps to HBM→SMEM loads, SMEM→TMEM copies, MMA launches, and TMEM→HBM stores. (7) Persistent grid: one threadblock per SM (148 total) for sustained occupancy.

evidence.strategy: refine asynchronous TMA transfers and overlapping computation with advanced memory prefetching.
Fine-tune block sizes, tile shapes, and num_warps for improved GPU speedup

pitfalls: TMEM→register transfer (tcgen05.ld + tcgen05.wait) has significant latency — pipeline with 5-slot circular buffers to hide it
CUDA core FP32 throughput is only 80 TFLOPS vs 4500 TFLOPS FP8 tensor cores — dequantization in CUDA cores takes 1.76x the matmul time, use hardware block-scaled MMA instead
tcgen05.mma requires scale factors in TMEM (loaded via HBM→SMEM→TMEM path) — produce scales in tcgen05-compatible layout during quantization
2-CTA mode shares B matrix between two SMs, reducing memory traffic 15-20% — always use for FP8 matmul
Full 128x512 TMEM gives highest tensor core throughput but block-scaled MMA can only use 128x256 (half) — expect ~5% throughput drop vs non-scaled
Blackwell measured peak HBM is ~6.8 TB/s for contiguous reads — random access patterns (expert routing) reduce effective bandwidth significantly
Quantization overhead can be 76% of matmul time if not fused — fuse quantization into kernel prologues/epilogues and produce scale layout inline
